nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 乍得
nodes.summary: 乍得是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联65种鸟类，包括Schlegel's francolin、Clapperton's spurfowl、Arabian bustard等65种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 锈色歌百灵
nodes.summary: 锈色歌百灵（Rusty bush lark，学名 Calendulauda rufa），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Hubert Lynes、乍得，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: Hubert Lynes
nodes.summary: Hubert Lynes是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括锈色歌百灵、Highland lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Calendulauda rufa |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22717101A263888587 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22717101A263888587.en |access-date=2 August 2025}} | genus = Calendulauda | species = rufa | authority = (Lynes, 1920) | subdivision_ranks = Subspecies | subdivision = See text | synonyms = | range_map = Mirafra rufa distribution map.png }} The rusty bush lark (Calendulauda rufa), also known as the rusty lark, is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in the Sahel region of north-central Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is typically found inhabiting the dry savannah ecoregions of Chad, Mali, Niger, Sudan, and Togo. It occurs in dry savanna with scattered open Combretum woodland. Despite being listed by IUCN as 'Least Concern', none were seen between May 1931 and 2 February 2026, when one was seen in south-central Chad; this sighting resulted in the first live photographs of the species ever taken

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is typically found inhabiting the dry savannah ecoregions of Chad, Mali, Niger, Sudan, and Togo. It occurs in dry savanna with scattered open Combretum woodland.
